name: Ondelopran
description: Ondelopran has been used in trials studying the treatment of Alcohol Dependence.

interactions.name: Methylnaltrexone
interactions.description: The risk or severity of adverse effects can be increased when Ondelopran is combined with Methylnaltrexone.

interactions.name: Naloxegol
interactions.description: The risk or severity of adverse effects can be increased when Ondelopran is combined with Naloxegol.
